textPlain: Have diamonds found their way into other industrial cooling solutions? With the research into gem grade diamonds, I have been expecting cheap ugly synthetic diamonds to be used in more products. I have long joked that I want a diamond frying pan.
This reminded me of this: https://www.innovationcooling.com/products/ic-diamond/?srslt... which seemed to be all the rage in PC building 10 years ago
> ugly synthetic diamondsNot any more, their quality has increased recently. Not that I care, wife and I did without them during our engagement.
> I have long joked that I want a diamond frying panAs long as you don’t use it on a gas stove, you should be fine.
